codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. The session_hygiene.rs module provides: (1) 60-minute checkpoint interval via SessionHygieneConfig::default() with checkpoint_interval_secs = 3600 (2) Progress evaluation at checkpoints via ProgressEvaluation struct with health status tracking (3) Session state persistence via SessionHygiene struct with HashMap storage. All 28 unit tests pass.

issues.description: Unused variable `cp1` in test_session_hygiene_full_lifecycle test - consider prefixing with underscore
Unused variable `cp` in test_get_checkpoint_history test loop - consider prefixing with underscore
Unused variable `i` in test_checkpoint_pruning test - consider prefixing with underscore
Comparison is useless due to type limits - u64 is always >= 0

sharedStateObservations.observation: The session_hygiene.rs module is properly integrated into the crate via lib.rs:36 and exported via lib.rs:127
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Module is public and all key types (SessionHygiene, SessionHygieneConfig, ProgressEvaluation, ProgressHealth) are exported

summary: Feature orch-session-hygiene PASSES review. Implementation correctly provides: (1) 60-minute checkpoint interval via default checkpoint_interval_secs = 3600 (2) Progress evaluation with ProgressEvaluation struct calculating progress ratio, health status, and recommendations (3) Session state persistence via SessionHygiene struct. All 28 tests pass. Minor unused variable warnings exist in tests but are non-blocking.
